2604.08120.title: Small Vision-Language Models are Smart Compressors for Long Video Understanding
2604.08120.paper_summary: Adapting Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) for hour-long videos is bottlenecked by context limits. Dense visual streams saturate token budgets and exacerbate the lost-in-the-middle phenomenon. Existing heuristics, like sparse sampling or uniform pooling, blindly sacrifice fidelity by discarding decisive moments and wasting bandwidth on irrelevant backgrounds. We propose Tempo, an efficient query-aware framework compressing long videos for downstream understanding. Tempo leverages a Small Vision-Language Model (SVLM) as a local temporal compressor, casting token reduction as an early cross-modal distillation process to generate compact, intent-aligned representations in a single forward pass. To enforce strict budgets without breaking causality, we introduce Adaptive Token Allocation (ATA). Exploiting the SVLM's zero-shot relevance prior and semantic front-loading, ATA acts as a training-free $O(1)$ dynamic router. It allocates dense bandwidth to query-critical segments while compressing redundancies into minimal temporal anchors to maintain the global storyline. Extensive experiments show our 6B architecture achieves state-of-the-art performance with aggressive dynamic compression (0.5-16 tokens/frame). On the extreme-long LVBench (4101s), Tempo scores 52.3 under a strict 8K visual budget, outperforming GPT-4o and Gemini 1.5 Pro. Scaling to 2048 frames reaches 53.7. Crucially, Tempo compresses hour-long videos substantially below theoretical limits, proving true long-form video understanding relies on intent-driven efficiency rather than greedily padded context windows.
2604.08120.paper_summary_zh: 調整多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）以適應長達一小時的視頻受到上下文限制的瓶頸。密集的視覺流飽和了標記預算，並加劇了迷失於中間的現象。現有的啟發式方法，如稀疏取樣或均勻池化，盲目犧牲了保真度，通過丟棄關鍵時刻並在不相關的背景上浪費帶寬。我們提出了Tempo，一個高效的查詢感知框架，用於壓縮長視頻以便於下游理解。Tempo利用小型視覺語言模型（SVLM）作為局部時間壓縮器，將標記減少視為一個早期的跨模態蒸餾過程，以在一次前向傳遞中生成緊湊且與意圖對齊的表示。為了在不破壞因果關係的情況下強制執行嚴格的預算，我們引入了自適應標記分配（ATA）。ATA利用SVLM的零樣本相關性先驗和語義前置，作為一個無需訓練的$O(1)$動態路由器。它將密集的帶寬分配給查詢關鍵的片段，同時將冗餘壓縮成最小的時間錨點，以維持全球故事情節。大量實驗表明，我們的6B架構在激進的動態壓縮（0.5-16標記/幀）下達到了最先進的性能。在極長的LVBench（4101秒）上，Tempo在嚴格的8K視覺預算下得分52.3，超越了GPT-4o和Gemini 1.5 Pro。擴展到2048幀時達到53.7。關鍵是，Tempo將長達一小時的視頻壓縮至遠低於理論限制，證明真正的長格式視頻理解依賴於以意圖驅動的效率，而不是貪婪地填充上下文窗口。
2604.08120.author: Junjie Fei et.al.
2604.08120.authors: Junjie Fei, Jun Chen, Zechun Liu, Yunyang Xiong, Chong Zhou, Wei Wen, Junlin Han, Mingchen Zhuge, Saksham Suri, Qi Qian, Shuming Liu, Lemeng Wu, Raghuraman Krishnamoorthi, Vikas Chandra, Mohamed Elhoseiny, Chenchen Zhu
